Class SkillService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.skill.SkillService
@Service public class SkillService extends Object

    breakCategoryRelationships(Set<Integer> ids)
    Opens an isolated transaction, sets all foreign keys to NULL, persists this to the DB and closes the transaction again immediately.

  • Constructor Details

    • SkillService

      public SkillService()

  • Method Details

    • getAllSkills

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<Skill> getAllSkills()

    • getAllSkillSummaries

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<SkillSummaryDTO> getAllSkillSummaries()
      All skills flattened to SkillSummaryDTO for the admin skills grid. The lazy category is resolved here inside the read-only transaction (id + name), so the Vaadin view never touches a detached lazy relation and the degenerate Skill equals/hashCode never reaches a grid key mapper.

    • createSkill

      @Transactional public Skill createSkill(Skill skill, PUser user)

    • createCategory

      @Transactional public SkillCategory createCategory(SkillCategory category)

    • getSkillsForUser

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Set<SkillRecord> getSkillsForUser(Long userId)

    • assignSkillToUser

      @Transactional public SkillRecord assignSkillToUser(Long userId, SkillRecord record)

    • getSkillsForResource

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Set<SkillRecord> getSkillsForResource(Long resourceId)

    • assignSkillToResource

      @Transactional public SkillRecord assignSkillToResource(Long resourceId, SkillRecord record)

    • getAllCategories

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<SkillCategory> getAllCategories()

    • getAllCategorySummaries

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<SkillCategoryDTO> getAllCategorySummaries()
      All categories flattened to SkillCategoryDTO for the admin categories grid and the parent/category selectors. The lazy parentCategory is resolved here in-tx (id + name), keeping the LazyInit-prone SkillCategory entity out of every Vaadin grid/ComboBox.

    • getCategoryById

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public SkillCategory getCategoryById(Long categoryId)

    • updateCategory

      @Transactional public SkillCategory updateCategory(Long categoryId, SkillCategory categoryDetails)

    • deleteSkill

      @Transactional public void deleteSkill(Long skillId, PUser user)

    • deleteCategory

      @Transactional public void deleteCategory(Long categoryId)

    • breakCategoryRelationships

      @Transactional(propagation=REQUIRES_NEW) public void breakCategoryRelationships(Set<Integer> ids)
      Opens an isolated transaction, sets all foreign keys to NULL, persists this to the DB and closes the transaction again immediately.

    • getSkillById

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Skill getSkillById(Long skillId, PUser user)

    • updateSkill

      @Transactional public Skill updateSkill(Long skillId, Skill skillDetails, PUser user)
